calendar.matters:
Petition For Approval And Settlement Of Claims (Prob. Code 19020 Et Seq.)
Off Calendar Jan-17-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Claudia Choy for and with Julien Nepomuceno (Petitioner).

The Court indicated that the Notice under 19023 requires personal notice. Ms. Choy provided the reasoning for this petition and that she argued that the Court can allow service under CCP 413.30. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. Not Reported.

Petition For Approval And Settlement Of Claims (Prob. Code 19020 Et Seq.)
Off Calendar Dec-31-2013 Continued To Jan-14-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Approval And Settlement Of Claims (Prob. Code 19020 Et Seq.)
Off Calendar Dec-17-2013 Continued To Dec-31-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
